place: Bang Po, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Level Hillside Villa with 20m Pool & Infinity Lawn - Bang Po
note: Daily breakfast · airport transfers · chef on request
sleeps: Up to 10 guests · 5 en-suite bedrooms · flexes to 16
blurb: A five-level hillside villa on Koh Samui's west coast built around a 20-metre ocean-view infinity pool and a covered poolside dining terrace, with a double-height master suite and mezzanine office, a dedicated children's bedroom with its own bathroom and terrace, in-villa spa treatments, and a broad lower lawn framed by sweeping coastal views — with flexible bedding that lets the villa host up to sixteen.
detail:
Set above Bang Po on Koh Samui's west coast, this five-level villa is arranged around a 20-metre ocean-view infinity pool and a wide covered terrace, with five en-suite bedrooms and seven bathrooms, including a double-height master suite with its own mezzanine office — a space that converts easily into a sixth bedroom with a double sofa bed — and a dedicated children's bedroom with two bunk-attached beds and its own bathroom and walled terrace. Five bedrooms sleep ten in the standard layout, and with the mezzanine and extra bedding pressed into service the villa hosts up to sixteen, which makes it a natural pick for multi-generation stays and celebrations.

Living spaces run straight into the pool and terrace behind floor-to-ceiling glass: a sunken lounge, a twelve-seat dining table cut from a single piece of acacia wood, and a show-kitchen with a granite breakfast bar and a separate staff kitchen behind it. The pool terrace itself holds a ten-seat covered dining area and a built-in barbecue, while a broad lawn on the lower level opens onto the same sweeping coastal views. Every bedroom has a flat-screen TV, generous wardrobes and a walk-in rain shower, with a sea-view bathtub in the master.

Ten minutes from Nathon town and the same again from the restaurants and beach clubs around Four Seasons, with Nikki Beach in Lipa Noi about twenty minutes further, the villa comes with an on-site hospitality team, a private chef, daily breakfast, a complimentary airport transfer and a car for exploring the island. Massages, facials, manicures and pedicures can all be arranged in the villa, so spa days never require leaving the hillside.

features.l: Double-height master suite with mezzanine office
Lower-level lawn framed by coastal views
In-villa spa treatments, chef & car included
